member.name: T:DebugxLog.DebugxBurst
member.summary: 用于Burst多线程代码中的Debug工具类。 Debug utility class for Burst multithreaded code.

member.name: M:DebugxLog.DebugxBurst.Log(System.Int32,System.Object,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: 成员打印Log。 必须在Entities.ForEach().WithoutBurst().Run()时才能工作。
member.param: DebugxMemberInfo中配置的key
打印内容
显示时间
显示网络标记，Server或者Client。此功能依赖项目，需要项目通过SetServerCheck方法来设置

member.name: M:DebugxLog.DebugxBurst.LogWarning(System.Int32,System.Object,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: 成员打印LogWarning。 必须在Entities.ForEach().WithoutBurst().Run()时才能工作。
member.param: DebugxMemberInfo中配置的key
打印内容
显示时间
显示网络标记，Server或者Client。此功能依赖项目，需要项目通过SetServerCheck方法来设置

member.name: M:DebugxLog.DebugxBurst.LogError(System.Int32,System.Object,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: 成员打印LogError。 必须在Entities.ForEach().WithoutBurst().Run()时才能工作。
member.param: DebugxMemberInfo中配置的key
打印内容
显示时间
显示网络标记，Server或者Client。此功能依赖项目，需要项目通过SetServerCheck方法来设置

member.name: T:DebugxLog.Debugx
member.summary: Debugx Core Utility Class. Debugx核心工具类。 Unity 中会继承此类自动创建 Debugx 类，根据当前成员配置生成快速调用方法，比如 LogJack()。

member.name: F:DebugxLog.Debugx.enableLog
member.summary: Master switch for logging. Log总开关。

member.name: F:DebugxLog.Debugx.enableLogMember
member.summary: Master switch for member logs. 成员Log总开关。

member.name: F:DebugxLog.Debugx.allowUnregisteredMember
member.summary: Allow unregistered members to print logs. 允许没有注册成员进行打印。

member.name: F:DebugxLog.Debugx.logThisKeyMemberOnly
member.summary: Only print logs for this key. 0 means off; when set to another key, only logs for this key will be printed if the corresponding member info exists. This value can only be set after turning off logMasterOnly. 仅打印此Key的Log。 0为关闭，设置其他Key时，只有此Key对应的成员信息确实存在，才会只打印此Key的成员Log。 必须关闭logMasterOnly后才能设置此值

member.name: E:DebugxLog.Debugx.OnRawLog
member.summary: Structured raw log event. Fired once at the single logging funnel (LogCreator), on the same thread and immediately before UnityEngine.Debug.unityLogger.Log, carrying member metadata + the original message + the final composed string. Intended for tooling such as the Debugx Console to consume logs with full member metadata (instead of re-parsing the formatted text). Only meaningful while DEBUG_X is defined (the whole logging path compiles out otherwise). When there is no subscriber the payload is not even constructed, so the cost is near zero. 结构化原始日志事件。在唯一日志收口点（LogCreator）中、于同一线程且紧邻 UnityEngine.Debug.unityLogger.Log 之前触发一次，携带成员元数据 + 原始 message + 拼好的最终显示串。供 Debugx Console 等工具以完整成员元数据消费日志 （而非对格式化文本做正则反解）。仅在定义了 DEBUG_X 时有意义（否则整条日志路径被编译掉）。 无订阅者时连负载都不会构造，开销近似为零。

member.name: M:DebugxLog.Debugx.IsDebugxTagged(System.String)
member.summary: Whether a log message string was produced by Debugx (i.e. it contains the DebugxTag). Lets consumers de-duplicate: a message captured from Application.logMessageReceived that is Debugx-tagged has already been delivered via OnRawLog and should not be counted a second time. Centralizing the check here keeps it in sync with DebugxTag (mirrors the tag regex in LogOutput). 判断一条日志字符串是否由 Debugx 产生（即包含 DebugxTag）。 供消费方去重：从 Application.logMessageReceived 捕获到、且带 Debugx 标签的消息，已经通过 OnRawLog 投递过， 不应重复计入。判定收敛在此处，与 DebugxTag 保持同步（对应 LogOutput 中的标签正则）。
member.param: The log message string to test. 待检测的日志字符串。
member.returns: True if the message carries the DebugxTag. 若消息带有 DebugxTag 则为 true。

member.name: M:DebugxLog.Debugx.OnAwake
member.summary: OnAwake lifecycle method. Awake 生命周期方法。

member.name: M:DebugxLog.Debugx.OnDestroy
member.summary: OnDestroy lifecycle method. OnDestroy 生命周期方法。

member.name: M:DebugxLog.Debugx.ResetToDefault
member.summary: Reset data to defaults in Settings. 重置数据到Settings中Default。

member.name: M:DebugxLog.Debugx.SetMemberEnable(System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Set member switch during game runtime. 在游戏运行时设置成员开关。
member.param: The key of the member to set. 成员的Key。
Whether to enable or disable the member log. 是否启用该成员的日志。

member.name: M:DebugxLog.Debugx.MemberIsEnable(System.Int32)
member.summary: Confirm whether the member is enabled. 确认成员是否打开。
member.param: The key of the member. 成员的Key。
member.returns: True if enabled, otherwise false. 是否启用。

member.name: M:DebugxLog.Debugx.SetServerCheck(System.Func{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Sets the method to determine whether the current context is a server. 设置确认是否是服务器的方法。 This should be called by the project. Only after this is set, can the Logx series methods print network tags when showNetTag is true. 由项目调用设置，那么Logx系列方法的showNetTag参数设置为true后，才能打印网络标记。
member.param: The function used to check if the current context is a server. 用于判断当前是否服务器的方法。

member.name: M:DebugxLog.Debugx.ContainsMemberKey(System.Int32)
member.summary: Checks if a member key exists. 确认成员Key是否包含。 This method can be used both during runtime and outside of runtime. 在程序运行时和非运行时都可用。
member.param: The member key to check. 成员的Key。
member.returns: Returns true if the member key exists; otherwise, false. 如果存在该成员Key则返回true，否则返回false。

member.name: M:DebugxLog.Debugx.Log(System.Int32,System.Object,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Member log printing. 成员打印Log。
member.remarks: Note: message is typed as object. Turning a member OFF (or the master switches off) still lets the caller's string interpolation / boxing execute before this method decides to drop the log. Disabling a member is NOT zero-cost while DEBUG_X is defined; for hot paths, guard with MemberIsEnable or compile out via DEBUG_X. 注意：message 为 object 类型。关闭某成员（或总开关关闭）时，调用方的字符串插值/装箱仍会在本方法丢弃日志前完成。 在定义了 DEBUG_X 的情况下，关闭成员并非零成本；高频路径请先用 MemberIsEnable 判断，或用 DEBUG_X 宏整体编译掉。
member.param: Member key, configured in DebugxMemberInfo. 成员密钥，DebugxMemberInfo中配置的key。
Content to log. 打印内容。
Whether to show timestamp. 显示时间。
Whether to show network tag (Server or Client). This feature depends on the project and requires setting via the SetServerCheck method. 显示网络标记，Server或者Client。此功能依赖项目，需要项目通过SetServerCheck方法来设置。

member.name: M:DebugxLog.Debugx.Log(System.String,System.Object,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Member log printing. 成员打印Log。
member.param: Member signature, configured in DebugxMemberInfo. 成员签名，DebugxMemberInfo中配置的Signature。
Content to log. 打印内容。
Whether to show timestamp. 显示时间。
Whether to show network tag (Server or Client). This feature depends on the project and requires setting via the SetServerCheck method. 显示网络标记，Server或者Client。此功能依赖项目，需要项目通过SetServerCheck方法来设置。

member.name: M:DebugxLog.Debugx.LogWarning(System.Int32,System.Object,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Member LogWarning printing. 成员打印LogWarning。
member.param: Member key, configured in DebugxMemberInfo. 成员密钥，DebugxMemberInfo中配置的key。
Content to log. 打印内容。
Whether to show timestamp. 显示时间。
Whether to show network tag (Server or Client). This feature depends on the project and requires setting via the SetServerCheck method. 显示网络标记，Server或者Client。此功能依赖项目，需要项目通过SetServerCheck方法来设置。

member.name: M:DebugxLog.Debugx.LogWarning(System.String,System.Object,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Member LogWarning printing. 成员打印LogWarning。
member.param: Member signature, configured in DebugxMemberInfo. 成员签名，DebugxMemberInfo中配置的Signature。
Content to log. 打印内容。
Whether to show timestamp. 显示时间。
Whether to show network tag (Server or Client). This feature depends on the project and requires setting via the SetServerCheck method. 显示网络标记，Server或者Client。此功能依赖项目，需要项目通过SetServerCheck方法来设置。

member.name: M:DebugxLog.Debugx.LogError(System.Int32,System.Object,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Member LogError printing. 成员打印LogError。
member.param: Member key, configured in DebugxMemberInfo. 成员密钥，DebugxMemberInfo中配置的key。
Content to log. 打印内容。
Whether to show timestamp. 显示时间。
Whether to show network tag (Server or Client). This feature depends on the project and requires setting via the SetServerCheck method. 显示网络标记，Server或者Client。此功能依赖项目，需要项目通过SetServerCheck方法来设置。

member.name: M:DebugxLog.Debugx.LogError(System.String,System.Object,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Member LogError printing. 成员打印LogError。
member.param: Member signature, configured in DebugxMemberInfo. 成员签名，DebugxMemberInfo中配置的Signature。
Content to log. 打印内容。
Whether to show timestamp. 显示时间。
Whether to show network tag (Server or Client). This feature depends on the project and requires setting via the SetServerCheck method. 显示网络标记，Server或者Client。此功能依赖项目，需要项目通过SetServerCheck方法来设置。

member.name: M:DebugxLog.Debugx.CheckLogThisKeyMemberOnly(System.Int32)
member.summary: Checks whether displaying only members with a specific key is enabled. Returns true to allow filtering by key; false to disallow and prevent logging. 确认是否开启了仅显示某个Key的成员。 true=允许通过 false=返回，不允许打印。

member.name: M:DebugxLog.Debugx.LogCreator(UnityEngine.LogType,System.Int32,System.Object,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Extended logging method. 扩展日志打印方法。
member.param: Log type. 日志类型。
Member key configured in DebugxMemberInfo. DebugxMemberInfo 中配置的成员 Key。
Content to log. 打印内容。
Whether to show the timestamp. 是否显示时间戳。

Whether to show the network tag (Server or Client). This feature depends on the project and requires setting via the SetServerCheck method. 是否显示网络标记（Server 或 Client）。 此功能依赖项目侧实现，需要通过 SetServerCheck 方法设置。

member.name: M:DebugxLog.Debugx.DispatchRawLog(UnityEngine.LogType,DebugxLog.DebugxMemberInfo,System.Object,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Build and dispatch the structured raw log to subscribers. The payload struct is not even constructed when there is no subscriber. Subscriber exceptions are isolated so one bad subscriber cannot break the logging pipeline or the other subscribers. 构造并向 订阅者派发结构化原始日志。无订阅者时连负载结构都不构造。 订阅者异常被隔离，避免单个坏订阅者破坏日志管线或其它订阅者。

member.name: M:DebugxLog.Debugx.LogAdm(System.Object,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Administrative log printing. For plugin developers only; generally not intended for use by others. 管理打印Log。 插件开发者使用，所有人理论上都不可使用此方法。
member.param: The content to log. 打印内容。
Whether to display the timestamp. 显示时间。
Whether to display the network tag (Server or Client). This feature depends on the project and requires setting via the SetServerCheck method. 显示网络标记，Server或者Client。此功能依赖项目，需要项目通过SetServerCheck方法来设置。

member.name: M:DebugxLog.Debugx.LogAdmWarning(System.Object,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Administrative log warning printing. For plugin developers only; generally not intended for use by others. 管理打印LogWarning。 插件开发者使用，所有人理论上都不可使用此方法。
member.param: The content to log as a warning. 打印内容。
Whether to display the timestamp. 显示时间。
Whether to display the network tag (Server or Client). This feature depends on the project and requires setting via the SetServerCheck method. 显示网络标记，Server或者Client。此功能依赖项目，需要项目通过SetServerCheck方法来设置。

member.name: M:DebugxLog.Debugx.LogAdmError(System.Object,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Administrative log error printing. For plugin developers only; generally not intended for use by others. 管理打印LogError。 插件开发者使用，所有人理论上都不可使用此方法。
member.param: The content to log as an error. 打印内容。
Whether to display the timestamp. 显示时间。
Whether to display the network tag (Server or Client). This feature depends on the project and requires setting via the SetServerCheck method. 显示网络标记，Server或者Client。此功能依赖项目，需要项目通过SetServerCheck方法来设置。

member.name: T:DebugxLog.DebugxMemberInfo
member.summary: Runtime member information. 运行时成员信息。

member.name: F:DebugxLog.DebugxMemberInfo.enableDefault
member.summary: Whether enabled. 是否开启。

member.name: F:DebugxLog.DebugxMemberInfo.key
member.summary: Debug member key. 调试成员密钥。

member.name: F:DebugxLog.DebugxMemberInfo.signature
member.summary: User signature. 使用者签名。

member.name: F:DebugxLog.DebugxMemberInfo.logSignature
member.summary: Whether user signature is printed in the log. 使用者签名是否打印在Log中。

member.name: F:DebugxLog.DebugxMemberInfo.header
member.summary: Header information, printed at the top of the log. 头部信息，在打印Log会打印在头部。

member.name: F:DebugxLog.DebugxMemberInfo.color
member.summary: RGB hexadecimal color code for log printing. 打印Log颜色的RGB十六进制数。

member.name: F:DebugxLog.DebugxMemberInfo.haveSignature
member.summary: Whether there is a signature. 是否有签名。

member.name: F:DebugxLog.DebugxMemberInfo.haveHeader
member.summary: Whether there is header information. 是否有头部信息。

member.name: P:DebugxLog.DebugxMemberInfo.LogSignature
member.summary: Print signature. 打印签名。

member.name: M:DebugxLog.DebugxMemberInfo.#ctor
member.summary: Default constructor. 默认构造函数。

member.name: M:DebugxLog.DebugxMemberInfo.#ctor(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Quick constructor for simple member info. 快速构造简单成员信息。
member.param: Debug member key 调试成员密钥
User signature 使用者签名

member.name: T:DebugxLog.DebugxProjectSettings
member.summary: Debugx settings. Debugx设置。

member.name: F:DebugxLog.DebugxProjectSettings.FileName
member.summary: Debugx project settings asset file name. Debugx项目设置Asset文件名称。

member.name: P:DebugxLog.DebugxProjectSettings.Instance
member.summary: Singleton instance. 单例。

member.name: P:DebugxLog.DebugxProjectSettings.AdminInfo
member.summary: Administrator member. 管理者成员。

member.name: F:DebugxLog.DebugxProjectSettings.members
member.summary: List of member information. 成员信息列表。

member.name: F:DebugxLog.DebugxProjectSettings.DebugxTag
member.summary: Debugx printed content tag. No special symbols with regex meanings are allowed. When modifying, also update the regex in LogOutput. Debugx打印的内容标识。 不允许带有任何正则表达式的特殊含义符号。 修改时需要同事修改LogOutput的正则表达式。

member.name: F:DebugxLog.DebugxProjectSettings.NormalInfoSignature
member.summary: Default member normal signature. 默认成员，普通成员签名。

member.name: F:DebugxLog.DebugxProjectSettings.NormalInfoKey
member.summary: Default member normal key. 默认成员，普通成员密钥。

member.name: P:DebugxLog.DebugxProjectSettings.NormalInfoColor
member.summary: Default member normal color. 默认成员，普通成员颜色。

member.name: F:DebugxLog.DebugxProjectSettings.MasterInfoSignature
member.summary: Default member master signature. 默认成员，高级成员签名。

member.name: F:DebugxLog.DebugxProjectSettings.MasterInfoKey
member.summary: Default member master key. 默认成员，高级成员密钥。

member.name: P:DebugxLog.DebugxProjectSettings.MasterInfoColor
member.summary: Default member master color. 默认成员，高级成员颜色。

member.name: F:DebugxLog.DebugxProjectSettings.enableLogDefault
member.summary: Master log switch. Log总开关。

member.name: F:DebugxLog.DebugxProjectSettings.enableLogMemberDefault
member.summary: Member log master switch. 成员Log总开关。

member.name: F:DebugxLog.DebugxProjectSettings.allowUnregisteredMember
member.summary: Allow printing without registered members. 允许没有注册成员进行打印。

member.name: F:DebugxLog.DebugxProjectSettings.logThisKeyMemberOnlyDefault
member.summary: Only print logs for this Key member, 0 to disable. 仅打印此Key的成员Log，0为关闭。

member.name: M:DebugxLog.DebugxProjectSettings.KeyValid(System.Int32)
member.summary: Whether the key is valid. Key是否合法。
member.param: The key to validate 要验证的密钥
member.returns: True if valid, false otherwise 是否有效

member.name: M:DebugxLog.DebugxProjectSettings.LoadResources
member.summary: Load configuration resources. 加载配置资源。

member.name: M:DebugxLog.DebugxProjectSettings.ApplyBy(DebugxLog.IDebugxProjectSettingsAsset)
member.summary: Read data from asset and save to DebugxProjectSettings. 从Asset读取数据保存到DebugxProjectSettings。
member.param: The settings asset 设置资源

member.name: F:DebugxLog.DebugxProjectSettings.logOutput
member.summary: Output logs to local file. 输出Log到本地文件。

member.name: F:DebugxLog.DebugxProjectSettings.enableLogStackTrace
member.summary: Enable stack trace for Log type. 输出Log类型的堆栈跟踪。

member.name: F:DebugxLog.DebugxProjectSettings.enableWarningStackTrace
member.summary: Enable stack trace for Warning type. 输出Warning类型的堆栈跟踪。

member.name: F:DebugxLog.DebugxProjectSettings.enableErrorStackTrace
member.summary: Enable stack trace for Error type. 输出Error类型的堆栈跟踪。

member.name: F:DebugxLog.DebugxProjectSettings.recordAllNonDebugxLogs
member.summary: Record all logs not printed by Debugx. 记录所有非Debugx打印的Log。

member.name: T:DebugxLog.DebugxLogCategory
member.summary: Category of a structured raw log, distinguishing the member / admin / unregistered source. 结构化原始日志的分类，用于区分 成员 / 管理通道 / 未注册 三种来源。

member.name: F:DebugxLog.DebugxLogCategory.Member
member.summary: Normal member log (custom member, or preset Normal/Master). 普通成员日志（自定义成员，或预设 Normal/Master）。

member.name: F:DebugxLog.DebugxLogCategory.Admin
member.summary: Admin channel log via LogAdm (key 0); bypasses member switches. 管理通道日志（LogAdm，key 0）；不受成员开关影响。

member.name: F:DebugxLog.DebugxLogCategory.Unregistered
member.summary: Log from an unregistered member key/signature (printed because allowUnregisteredMember is true). 来自未注册成员 key/signature 的日志（因 allowUnregisteredMember 为真而打印）。

member.name: T:DebugxLog.DebugxRawLog
member.summary: Structured raw log payload dispatched by at the single logging funnel. It carries member metadata + the original message + the final composed string, so a Console can consume Debugx logs with full member context without re-parsing the formatted text. Value type (plain struct with readonly fields, .NET 3.5 friendly) to avoid per-log heap allocation. 由 在唯一日志收口点派发的结构化原始日志负载。 携带成员元数据 + 原始 message + 拼好的最终显示串，使 Console 无需对格式化文本做正则反解即可以完整成员上下文消费 Debugx 日志。 采用值类型（普通 struct + readonly 字段，兼容 .NET 3.5）以避免每条日志的堆分配。

member.name: F:DebugxLog.DebugxRawLog.UnregisteredKey
member.summary: Sentinel member key for unregistered logs (no member info). Distinct from Admin's key 0. 未注册日志（无成员信息）的哨兵 key。与 Admin 的 key 0 区分。

member.name: F:DebugxLog.DebugxRawLog.Key
member.summary: Member key. >0 custom; -1 Normal; -2 Master; 0 Admin; when unregistered. 成员 key。>0 自定义；-1 Normal；-2 Master；0 Admin；未注册为 。

member.name: F:DebugxLog.DebugxRawLog.Signature
member.summary: Member signature; null when unregistered. 成员签名；未注册时为 null。

member.name: F:DebugxLog.DebugxRawLog.ColorHex
member.summary: Member color, 6-digit RGB hex without '#'; null when the member has no color. 成员颜色，六位 RGB 十六进制无 '#'；成员无颜色时为 null。

member.name: F:DebugxLog.DebugxRawLog.Header
member.summary: Member header; null when the member has no header. 成员 header；成员无 header 时为 null。

member.name: F:DebugxLog.DebugxRawLog.LogSignatureShown
member.summary: Whether the signature prefix "[Sig: xxx]" was shown in . 签名前缀 "[Sig: xxx]" 是否已出现在 中。

member.name: F:DebugxLog.DebugxRawLog.Category
member.summary: Source category (Member / Admin / Unregistered). 来源分类（Member / Admin / Unregistered）。

member.name: F:DebugxLog.DebugxRawLog.LogType
member.summary: Log level. Debugx only produces Log / Warning / Error. 日志级别。Debugx 只产生 Log / Warning / Error。

member.name: F:DebugxLog.DebugxRawLog.RawMessage
member.summary: Original message object passed by the caller (unformatted, without tag/color/prefix). 调用方传入的原始 message（未格式化，不含标签/颜色/前缀）。

member.name: F:DebugxLog.DebugxRawLog.FinalText
member.summary: Final composed string emitted to unityLogger (with tag / color / net tag / time / signature). 发给 unityLogger 的最终显示串（含标签 / 颜色 / 网络标签 / 时间 / 签名）。

member.name: F:DebugxLog.DebugxRawLog.NetTagShown
member.summary: Whether a Server/Client net tag was actually shown in (true only when a net tag was requested AND a server-check delegate is registered). Combine with to get the tag. 是否在 中真正显示了 Server/Client 网络标签（仅当请求了网络标签且已注册 server-check 委托时为 true）。 与 组合即可得到具体标签。

member.name: F:DebugxLog.DebugxRawLog.ShowTime
member.summary: Whether a timestamp was requested for this log. 本条日志是否请求了时间戳。

member.name: F:DebugxLog.DebugxRawLog.IsServer
member.summary: Whether the net context evaluated as server (only meaningful when ShowNetTag and a server-check is set). 网络上下文是否判定为服务器（仅当 ShowNetTag 且已设置 server-check 时有意义）。

member.name: F:DebugxLog.DebugxRawLog.Timestamp
member.summary: Local time when the log was produced. 日志产生时的本地时间。

member.name: M:DebugxLog.DebugxRawLog.#ctor(System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,DebugxLog.DebugxLogCategory,UnityEngine.LogType,System.Object,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Creates a structured raw log payload. Fields map one-to-one to the members documented above. 创建结构化原始日志负载。各参数与上面文档化的字段一一对应。

member.name: T:DebugxLog.IDebugxProjectSettingsAsset
member.summary: Debugx settings asset interface. Debugx设置资源接口。

member.name: M:DebugxLog.IDebugxProjectSettingsAsset.ApplyTo(DebugxLog.DebugxProjectSettings)
member.summary: Copy data. 复制数据。

member.name: T:DebugxLog.Tools.LogOutput
member.summary: Utility class for outputting logs to a local .txt file. 输出Log到本地txt文件工具类。

member.name: P:DebugxLog.Tools.LogOutput.DirectoryPath
member.summary: Output folder path. 输出文件夹路径。

member.name: M:DebugxLog.Tools.LogOutput.RecordStart
member.summary: Start of logging. 记录开始。

member.name: M:DebugxLog.Tools.LogOutput.RecordOver
member.summary: End of logging. 记录结束。
